metadata.title: Cruel Summer
metadata.lyrics:
[00:17.98] Hot summer streets and the pavements are burning
[00:21.75] I sit around
[00:26.73] Trying to smile but the air is so heavy and dry
[00:33.34] 
[00:36.27] Strange voices are sayin' (what did they say?)
[00:41.17] Things I can't understand
[00:44.25] It's too close for comfort, this heat has got right out of hand
[00:52.56] It's a cruel, (cruel) cruel summer
[00:58.76] Leavin' me here on my own
[01:01.35] It's a cruel, (it's a cruel) cruel summer
[01:05.76] Now you're gone
[01:08.79] 
[01:19.62] The city is crowded, my friends are away
[01:23.69] And I'm on my own
[01:28.43] It's too hot to handle, so I got to get up and go
[01:36.75] It's a cruel, (cruel) cruel summer
[01:43.04] Leavin' me here on my own
[01:45.68] It's a cruel, (it's a cruel) cruel summer
[01:50.03] Now you're gone
[01:51.92] Gonna feel only it was
[01:54.44] It's a cruel, (cruel) cruel summer
[01:58.70] (Leavin' me) leavin' me here on my own

[02:07.67] Now you're gone
[02:10.82] 
[02:38.72] It's a cruel, cruel summer
[02:44.93] Leaving me here on my own
[02:47.72] It's a cruel, cruel summer
[02:51.81] Now you're gone
[02:53.99] You're not the only one
